This work was supported by Institute for Information & communications Technology Promotion(IITP) grant funded by the Korea government(MSIT)
(No.00223446, Development of object-oriented synthetic data generation and evaluation methods)

hero.title: Synthetic Spatio-Temporal Data Vault
hero.subtitle: SSTDV is a research project for generating and evaluation synthetic training data from the real-world spatiotemporal data.

features.heroSubtitle: Generate high-quality synthetic data from real-world spatio-temporal data, and verify quality through statistical and objective metrics.
features.generationSubtitle: Generate high-quality synthetic spatio-temporal data with domain knowledge encoding.
features.knowledgeEncodingDesc:
Implement computable data structures and generative models for explicitly encoding prior knowledge — structure, dynamics, and physical constraints — of entities in spatio-temporal data.
SoftwareBrainShapeToolKit — Brain MRI-based shape extraction
DiffAM — Spine CT-based anatomical modeling
VCM — Conditional brain MRI image generation
HF-GAN — High-fidelity unified brain MRI synthesis
features.relationModelingDesc:
Model correlations, causality, and teleconnections among multivariate spatio-temporal data from prior knowledge and data, enabling data generation through generative model training and inference.
Software3D-VAR-DA — Physics-informed data assimilation-based spatiotemporal synthetic data generation
SST-Downscaling — Multi-source deep data fusion and super-resolution for sea surface temperature
SST-EVL — Spatiotemporal GNN for multivariate sea temperature forecasting
features.dataAssimilationDesc:
Improve spatio-temporal data synthesis accuracy by correcting accumulated errors and missing data during generation through data perturbation techniques.
Software3D-VAR-DA — Physics-informed data assimilation-based spatiotemporal synthetic data generation
SST-Downscaling — Multi-source deep data fusion and super-resolution for sea surface temperature
SST-EVL — Spatiotemporal GNN for multivariate sea temperature forecasting
features.objectiveReinforcementDesc:
Learn spatio-temporal data generation models using reward functions aligned with domain data requirements and objectives.
SoftwareDiffuAug — Breast MRI generation using Classifier-Free Diffusion Guidance with DDPM and DDIM sampling
features.evaluationSubtitle: Quantitatively verify the quality of generated synthetic data through statistical similarity and objective relevance.
features.statisticalSimilarityDesc:
Quantitatively evaluate distributional similarity and inter-variable correlations between synthetic and real data.
SoftwareEvalCorrSyn — Evaluation of multivariate distribution similarity in synthetic data
EvalSynLongD — Statistical similarity of real and synthetic longitudinal data (linear mixed-effects model, Cohen's d)
EvalDistSim — 1D data distribution similarity via KS test, KL divergence, and Jensen-Shannon divergence
features.objectiveRelevanceDesc:
Assess fitness-for-purpose by comparing AI model performance with real-only, synthetic-only, and mixed data configurations.
Evaluation ContentsClassification performance · Detection performance · Prediction performance
Real-only vs. Synthetic-only vs. Real+Synthetic comparison

resources.subtitle: Access project documentation, tutorials, software tools, and research outcomes.
resources.docsDesc: Tutorials for Virtual Brain & Breast Cancer pipelines, and software references for BrainShapeToolKit, DiffAM, and VCM.
resources.publicationsDesc: Papers, patents, open datasets, and application outcomes.
resources.researchDesc: SSTDV's synthetic data generation and evaluation methodology.

useCases.heroSubtitle: Validated in two medical imaging domains, demonstrating the effectiveness of objective-reinforced synthetic data.
useCases.brainOverview: Virtual Brain is a framework that simulates longitudinal and chronic brain imaging changes associated with neurodegenerative diseases and generates synthetic brain imaging data that can be used for disease classification and prediction model development.
useCases.brainDataDesc: Brain imaging data from Dongguk University and the ADNI open dataset.
useCases.brainEval1Desc: Evaluating distributional similarity between real and synthetic brain images.
useCases.brainEval2Desc: Reproducibility of region-specific chronic brain changes.
useCases.breastOverview: The Breast Cancer use case demonstrates breast MRI generation and breast shape prediction technologies for surgical simulation. Based on pre-operative and post-operative breast MR images, the framework quantitatively simulates resection regions and post-surgical breast shape changes, supporting breast cancer treatment planning, surgical planning, and shared decision-making between clinicians and patients.
useCases.breastDataDesc: The generative model is trained using 1,483 cases of pre-operative and post-operative breast MR images. The framework incorporates structural knowledge including resection regions, implant location, and implant size as conditioning information.
useCases.breastStep1Desc: Raw DICOM files are automatically classified into clinically meaningful MRI series to support AI model input selection and user navigation.
useCases.breastStep2Desc: Breast MR images are standardized through orientation correction, N4-bias field removal, noise reduction, and normalization.
useCases.breastStep3Desc: Breast tissue, tumor regions, resection regions, and implant-related structures are identified for quantitative analysis and generation conditioning.
useCases.breastStep4Desc: Pre-operative and post-operative MR images are aligned to construct training data for longitudinal generative modeling.
useCases.breastStep5Desc: A generative model predicts post-surgical breast MRI from pre-operative MRI, conditioned on surgical plan, tumor location, resection region, and implant information.
useCases.breastStep6Desc: Generated results can be integrated into a medical twin-based surgical planning system with MRI visualization, segmentation, measurement, and 3D rendering modules.
useCases.breastEval1Desc: Turing tests in which breast cancer specialists compare synthetic and real post-surgical MR images.
useCases.breastEval2Desc: Agreement between generated and reference surgical regions (resection and implant) measured using Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC).
